en.name: Ad-Hoc Committee of the Secretary General
en.topic: CLASSIFIED
en.description: A classified ad-hoc crisis. Delegates will be briefed when committee begins — prepare to respond to the unexpected.

en.name: American Civil War (Union)
en.topic: Preserving the Union
en.description: Take command of the Union war effort and shape the future of American democracy through its most divisive conflict.

en.name: Carnegie Steel Company
en.topic: Industry, labor, and antitrust at the turn of the century
en.description: Sit on the board of an industrial empire and navigate strikes, antitrust pressure, and cutthroat competition.

en.name: Disarmament and International Security Committee
en.topic: Disarmament of AI-enabled cyber weapons and attacks
en.description: Negotiate global frameworks to disarm AI-driven cyber weapons and prevent a new era of digital conflict.

en.name: Economic and Financial Committee
en.topic: Economic dependence on the illegal drug market
en.description: Confront the economies that have grown dependent on the illegal drug trade, with a focus on South America.

en.name: Greek War of Independence
en.topic: Greece vs. the Ottoman Empire
en.description: Fight for — or against — Greek independence from the Ottoman Empire in the 1820s.

en.name: Hurricane Katrina
en.topic: Managing the disaster and its aftermath
en.description: Coordinate the U.S. response to a catastrophic hurricane while new crises pile on.

en.name: Inter-Parliamentary Union
en.topic: Gender equality
en.description: As the world’s parliaments, advance gender equality through legislation and global cooperation.

en.name: Irish War of Independence (JCC)
en.topic: Ireland vs. Britain — a Joint Crisis Committee
en.description: A dual-cabinet clash between Irish revolutionaries and the British government over the future of Ireland.

en.name: Legal Committee
en.topic: International regulations on the use of space
en.description: Draft the legal frameworks that will govern humanity’s expanding presence in outer space.

en.name: North Atlantic Treaty Organization
en.topic: Humanitarian aid to Ukraine and reinforcing eastern members
en.description: As the NATO alliance, coordinate humanitarian aid to Ukraine and the defense of eastern member states.

en.name: OPEC Oil Embargo
en.topic: The 1973 Oil Crisis
en.description: As OPEC nations, wield oil as a weapon and reshape the global economy in 1973.

en.name: Post-War Japan
en.topic: Rebuilding Japan after the 1947 Constitution
en.description: Reconstruct a nation after WWII amid cultural change, occupation, and the shadow of the Korean War.

en.name: Second Continental Congress
en.topic: The American Revolutionary War
en.description: Steer the thirteen colonies through rebellion, independence, and the birth of a new nation.

en.name: Social, Humanitarian and Cultural Committee
en.topic: The Yemeni Civil War and refugee crisis
en.description: Address the humanitarian catastrophe of the Yemeni Civil War and the refugee crisis it has created.

en.name: Special Political and Decolonization Committee
en.topic: Multinational corporations and the exploitation of governments and labor
en.description: Examine how multinational corporations exploit governments and labor — and what the world can do about it.

en.name: The 2014 Ebola Outbreak
en.topic: Containing a global outbreak
en.description: Work across nations and agencies to contain a deadly Ebola outbreak before it spreads.

en.name: The Algerian War
en.topic: France and the threat of a coup
en.description: As the French government, confront a colonial war and the threat of a military coup at home.

en.name: The Bank War
en.topic: The National Bank vs. the Jackson administration
en.description: As the National Bank, survive President Jackson’s campaign to shut you down.

en.name: The Delian League
en.topic: The Greco-Persian Wars
en.description: Lead the alliance of Greek city-states as they confront the might of the Persian Empire.

en.name: The Fall of Constantinople
en.topic: The Byzantine Empire in the 1450s
en.description: As the Byzantine court, defend the last bastion of Rome against a rising Ottoman power.

en.name: The Haitian Revolution
en.topic: Revolution and independence in Saint-Domingue
en.description: Join the revolutionaries fighting to overthrow colonial rule and found a free Haiti.

en.name: The Iran Hostage Crisis
en.topic: The United States during the embassy hostage crisis
en.description: As the U.S. government, manage the crisis as embassy staff are held hostage in Tehran.

en.name: The Mongol Succession
en.topic: The empire after Genghis Khan
en.description: With Genghis Khan dead, fight to hold together — or seize control of — the largest land empire in history.

en.name: The Partition of India
en.topic: Independence and partition from Britain
en.description: Navigate the struggle for independence and the partition that will divide a subcontinent.

en.name: The Suez Crisis
en.topic: Trade disruption and refugees after the canal nationalization
en.description: As France, Britain, and Israel, respond to Egypt’s nationalization of the Suez Canal and its global fallout.

en.name: United Nations Children’s Fund
en.topic: Child labor and exploitation in South Asia
en.description: Tackle child labor and exploitation across South Asia and protect the rights of children worldwide.

en.name: War of 1812 (United States)
en.topic: The young United States at war
en.description: Guide the United States through a perilous war that will test the survival of the new republic.

en.name: War of the Spanish Succession
en.topic: The Grand Alliance
en.description: Coordinate the Dutch Republic, England, and the Habsburg Monarchy against Bourbon ambitions in early-1700s Europe.
